title: polygala hygrophila
intro: Polygala hygrophila, also known as Yuan Zhi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It is commonly used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polygala hygrophila include its ability to improve sleep quality, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for its medicinal uses, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
